definition:
1. to give in : 
2. to give into  one's hands, give up to , τινά or τί τινι (Euripides), etc.; a city, especially by treachery, (Thucydides) 
3. like Lat. praebere, to give, lend, afford, ἐνδιδόναι τινὶ χέρα to lend  him a hand, (Euripides); ἐνδ. λαβήν τινι to give  one a handle, (Aristophanes Comicus):—; to cause, excite , (Thucydides) 
4. to shew, exhibit , (Herdotus Historicus), etc. 
5. to allow, grant, concede , (Euripides) 
6. intransitive to give in, allow, permit , (Herdotus Historicus): to give in, give way , (Thucydides):—; ἐνδ. τινι to yield to , (Thucydides) (ML)
